name: okta_user_reported_suspicious_activity
description: An end user reported suspicious activity on their account (user.account.report_suspicious_activity_by_enduser).

validation.notes: Zero report_suspicious_activity_by_enduser events in 90d. The detection (the eventType itself) ports cleanly. DEGRADED: Panther title includes debugContext.debugData.suspiciousActivityEventType (the activity the user flagged), which is NOT ingested, so that context is lost. A user-reported compromise is a high-value, low-volume signal.
